question: Replace the background with a dramatic sunrise above a sea of clouds, with golden sunlight streaming from the back-left to cast a warm rim light along the person's silhouette, and render the clouds as vast and billowing with atmospheric depth.

Clean up that messy background and replace it with a sleek, minimalist Scandinavian-style home office—clean white walls, bright natural lighting, and an airy, open feel. Keep all the items on the desk exactly where they are, but make it look like they're sitting in an upscale, designer room.

Simulate a wide-aperture lens effect, applying a creamy, cinema-quality bokeh blur to all background elements and bystanders except for the fishmonger. The blur should produce natural, circular out-of-focus highlights from the string lights and reflective surfaces—no harsh, artificial Gaussian blur.

Transform the scene into a dark theater stage with only a single spotlight illuminating the dancer; the surroundings should be pitch black, yet the subtle texture of the stage floor planks should remain faintly visible.

Make the car look like it's racing down a highway at high speed. Apply motion blur to the background to convey a strong sense of velocity, add dynamic speed lines, but keep the car body crisp and perfectly in focus.
Change the time of day to golden hour, add dramatic sunset clouds with orange and pink hues in the sky, shift the entire color palette to warm tones, creating a cozy, nostalgic atmosphere.

Remove all surrounding tourists, film cameras, lighting equipment, and any modern infrastructure. Restore the background to an authentic medieval royal palace, making it appear empty, grand, and solemn.

Transform the scene to deep winter—cover the trees with heavy snow on every branch, replace the muddy ground with thick snow accumulation, convert the tire tracks into fresh impressions in the snow, and add gently falling snowflakes throughout.

Change the weather outside the window to a violent thunderstorm with heavy rain, add realistic rain streaks running down the glass, make the city outside look darker and more oppressive with a gloomy atmosphere.

Transform the background into a whimsical candy wonderland where trees become giant lollipops and the grass becomes fluffy cotton candy, but all the floating bubbles must remain intact and translucent, accurately refracting the colors of the new fantasy background through their surfaces.

Fill the entire arena with a roaring crowd, creating a sold-out, electric atmosphere with fans on their feet cheering, camera flashes popping throughout the stands, and an overall high-energy game-night vibe.
Replace the background with a Parisian street scene near the Eiffel Tower, achieving a candid street photography aesthetic with natural daylight instead of artificial stage lighting.
Remove all the smoke and fog effects, change the lighting to clear cool white light, and reveal the drummer at the back along with the LED video wall behind the stage.
Transform the water into molten lava, but the puppy must be protected by a glowing magical force field so it remains unharmed; the splashing droplets should become incandescent lava particles.

Colorize the photograph and sharpen the background, replacing it with a contemporary London streetscape. However, keep the two figures in black-and-white with their vintage wartime attire intact, creating a striking time-displacement contrast.

Replace the entire cluttered background with creamy bokeh orbs, replicating the look of an 85mm f/1.4 lens shot wide open—the out-of-focus highlights must show mechanical cat-eye vignetting and subtle onion-ring texture

Change the weather to a heavy snowfall winter scene, building rooftops and streets should have accumulated snow, the river should look cold and grey, but the building lights and windows should glow warmer to create contrast

Keep the subject and composition unchanged, transform the spring cherry blossom grove into a deep autumn red maple forest, leaves should display red-to-yellow gradient coloring, the ground must be carpeted with fallen leaves, change the lighting to golden late-afternoon backlight, and add a rim light effect along the edges of her hair

Transform the long-exposure photography effect into an instantaneous freeze-frame capture, converting the continuous streaming light trails into individual stationary vehicles with distinct taillights and headlights, while maintaining the overall nighttime atmosphere and city building illumination unchanged

Remove all signs of the studio setting and transform it to appear as if shot on the grand marble staircase of the Paris Opera House, featuring crystal chandelier illumination, red velvet carpeting, gilded balustrades, with dramatically theatrical lighting

Add a cinematic shallow depth of field effect with focus locked on the flambéing action, the spice jars in the foreground must show pronounced bokeh blur, the sous chef in the background must also be blurred out, but the flames must remain sharp since they occupy the same focal plane as the main subject

Convert the harsh midday direct sunlight into a soft overcast daylight effect, removing all the unflattering hard shadows from the faces entirely, but ensure the overall image remains bright and vibrant rather than becoming dark, flat, or washed out

Transform this starry sky into a time-lapse star trail effect, with stars rendered as concentric arc trajectories, Polaris positioned approximately in the upper left of the frame, simulating roughly two hours of stacked exposures, while keeping the foreground rock formations sharp and clear

Keep the person completely untouched, but replace the graffiti wall background with a weathered old brick wall overgrown with green ivy and patches of moss, with wild grass sprouting through the mortar joints between bricks, and apply an overall film-grain aesthetic with a Morandi color palette

Reposition the sun to be perfectly centered within the floral arch for a dramatic framing composition, intensify the golden hour warmth, significantly strengthen the backlighting effect, and create a dreamy luminous haze diffusing around the couple

Apply a long exposure photography technique to the pedestrians - convert all walking figures into motion blur trails and ghostly streaks, while keeping the pavement, buildings, and illuminated billboards perfectly sharp and crisp

Remove the venetian blind shadow stripes and replace them with a large tree visible outside the window, with sunlight filtering through its foliage to create dappled light patterns on her face and the wall—the shadows should have organic, irregular leaf shapes rather than geometric stripes

Lift the shadows throughout the scene without blowing out highlights, apply an HDR effect to bring out details in the darkest areas, shift the color grade toward the blue-purple cinematic atmosphere of 'La La Land', ensure the bottles and glassware display beautiful specular reflections and light refractions

Transform the rainy scene into a fog-shrouded early morning atmosphere, where the distant church and buildings are swallowed by dense fog leaving only faint silhouettes visible, while the nearby bridge remains relatively clear, creating a pronounced sense of atmospheric perspective and depth layering, with wisps of mist rising and hovering above the river surface

Transform the office background into a 'late-night crunch time' atmosphere: change the view outside the windows to a dark cityscape with scattered building lights, reduce indoor illumination to only a few desk lamps and glowing monitors as the primary light sources, and darken the remaining areas while keeping details still visible (avoid crushing everything into pure black). All people and desk objects must remain in their exact positions; shadow directions must correctly follow the new reduced light sources, and reflections on the glass partitions must update to accurately match the nighttime exterior and dim interior lighting.

Transform the background into a 'spring cherry blossom park in full bloom': keep the fountain in its exact position, but change all surrounding trees to cherry trees covered in dense pink and white blossoms; the distant view should also show masses of soft blossoms. Add gently drifting petals throughout the mid-ground and background, but ensure they do not obscure the foreground picnic blanket and food items. Retain the background pedestrians but render them softer with subtle bokeh blur. Apply a gentle highlight bloom and a faint pink-tinted lens flare across the image (creating a dreamy, ethereal quality while maintaining overall optical clarity).

Transform the background into an "approaching evening thunderstorm" atmosphere: sky shifts to heavy, ominous storm clouds with subtle lightning flickers on the distant horizon—keep it understated, not overdramatic; sea surface changes from calm to choppy with windswept wave textures. Overall lighting should darken to a cool blue-gray tone, but people's faces must remain clearly visible (apply selective local brightening as if using a layer mask exposure adjustment). The metal railing specular highlights must also adapt to the new environmental lighting.

Transform the scene from an indoor venue to an "outdoor music festival at night": expand the stage structure to include large LED video walls and a more open-air layout, add subtle fireworks or pyrotechnic sparks in the distant sky (keep them sparse, not overwhelming). Maintain the singer's exact pose and facial features unchanged. Adjust the audience phone screen brightness and reflections to match an outdoor nighttime atmosphere (avoid the harsh indoor white-light look). Add a subtle lens flare for atmosphere, but ensure it does not obscure the singer's face.

Replace the entire background with a 'modern minimalist coffee shop': white walls, polished concrete floor, floor-to-ceiling windows, minimal potted plants, sleek pendant lighting. The foreground elderly woman and her complete tea service must remain entirely untouched (shape, position, and all details preserved). However, the lighting must match the new environment: the directional side-light from the floor-to-ceiling windows must be consistent throughout, highlights on the table surface and tea service must appear natural, with no visible compositing or cutout edges.

Transform the scene into 'a tropical outdoor infinity pool at golden hour': open up the background to reveal an ocean horizon with palm tree silhouettes, ensuring the infinity edge blends seamlessly with the horizon line; shift the water surface reflections to warm golden sunset tones with softer, more languid ripples. Keep the foreground person and lounge chair in their original positions. Optionally add subtle lens flares and a hint of atmospheric haze to give it a cinematic resort-vacation feel, but do not over-blur the background details.
